review_notes: This entry records a reviewed release-evidence runtime acceptance summary produced inside the b96d02e API container.
The verifier confirmed safe reviewed-index export behavior and review-first retention policy acceptance with no runtime export blockers.

The inner runtime acceptance payload is a safe summary only and omits raw evidence roots, raw runtime payloads, object locators, workspace filesystem paths, executor-only internals, run identifiers, file identifiers, artifact identifiers, and personal workstation paths.

This focused evidence removes the G9 runtime export and retention acceptance blocker for the b96d02e Foundation Alpha POC runtime only. It does not close alert delivery and trace export 211 acceptance, signed Skill package/SBOM, ordinary-user legacy route acceptance, packaged frontend image release acceptance, or broader auth/session/RBAC regression gates.
